parameters.content: if namke, email, phone number and meeting date exsist in summary then hit erp end point
if no name, email, phone number and meeting date then workflow ends
this node see if the summary have email, name and phone number
if call hasnt been ended go back to wait node and wait for another 60 seconds and then check call status again this process is repeated until call ends and status gets updated
update the status of call from calling to completed
if call is ended it analyzes call summary and look for whether the meeting have been booked or not and gather full name, email and phone number from call transcribtion
this node decide what to do on basis of call status
check the call status to see if call have ended or not
this node do exactly nothing just make the workflow to wait for 60 seconds
